# Q9 share-of-total via windowcomp grand total (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q9 share-of-total via windowcomp grand total.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | comp sum(bytes_out) as total_out by host | windowcomp sum(total_out) as grand_total | alter pct_of_all = round(multiply(divide(to_float(total_out), to_float(grand_total)), 100)) | sort desc total_out | fields host, total_out, grand_total, pct_of_all
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 8). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
